title: RadiumTech
description:
A mod that adds nuclear materials called radiumtech.

This mod includes a whole bunch of new exciting materials like uranium, serium, thorium..etc.

You can craft armor, tools and decoration blocks .
body:
This Mod adds a bunch of new and exciting blocks and items.
Including uranium, serium, thorium and a whole lot more.
You can craft armor, tools and a bunch of decoration blocks.

The ores spawn naturally in the overworld adding more colors to your caves.
You can craft uranium pickaxes, serium pickaxes, thorium pickaxes, neptunium pickaxes, radium pickaxes.
And with that comes a whole lot of more mining speeds, each pickaxe has it's own miningspeed.
(Thorium is the quickest)
Uranium and Serium both have a durability of 650
Thorium, Actinium, Radium and Neptuminium have a durability of 5000 each

Each ore will also have an axe, shovel, sword, and a hoe

All tools can be crafted the same way you would craft normal tools.

Blocks: Each pickaxe has it's own ores and blocks, for example Uranium pickaxe would have deepslate uranium ore, uranium ore and a uranium block. Note that not all ores will have a tool because those are for for decoration of your base ore elsewhere. Each ore will drop normally with the raw item of that material, but some materials do not have a raw item so it will just drop the normal item of that ore.


This Mod also adds a custom biome for decoration reasons Its is called the red maple biome. This will spawn is the plains and savannah biomes

Armor: With every item comes an armor set each having a helmet, chestplate, leggings and boots.
The protection amount is based on the rarity of that ore spawning in the world. So the more rare it is the more protection you will get.


 
Credit to Nanoattack and modding by Kaupenjoe for making some of the textures

:https://www.youtube.com/c/tkaupenjoe
